rationale: The collapse of France-Germany joint fighter jet plans signals a new crack in European defense autonomy, directly relevant to Poland's NATO security calculus and EU strategic posture.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: The Franco-German FCAS fighter program collapse deepens EU defense fragmentation, raising questions about European security independence that directly affect Poland's strategic position within NATO.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal remains stalled, keeping mild energy price uncertainty alive for Poland; no structural change from the known stalemate, continuing slow decay.

top_events.title: Riots, violence, hate: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast
top_events.summary: Anti-immigrant violence in Belfast is a distant echo of migration tensions Poland monitors, but has no direct policy or security impact on Polish residents this cycle.
